title: Narayana Health Digital is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Narayana Health Digital is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
